indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for placing a yoga mat.

indicators.name: bathroom fixtures
indicators.rationale: Bathroom fixtures such as the bathtub and bidets are not suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: lack of open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is no open floor space available for yoga mat placement due to the presence of bathroom fixtures.

reasoning_summary: The hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga practice, but the presence of bathroom fixtures and lack of open floor space make this space marginally adequate for yoga / stretching.
